title: services.list_clients@1.0.0 args — read-only QUERY; no side effects

name.description: Optional name filter; locale-folded match (§6.3 rule 5).

$comment: Closes ADR-0001 (a live read verb that had no profile). First consumer of the 0.2.0 typed QUERY response contract; response shape pinned in list_clients.response.json.
